title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§805.  Budget to include additional salary

The governing authority of the parish of Terrebonne shall annually budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries fixed in R.S. 16:804.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 306, §1.
